mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, task_id, task_no, item_id, asset_id, print_time, print_result, error_message, source_type, printer_name, printer_ip, print_user_id, print_user_name, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sb_asset_print_log
mapper.insert: insert into sb_asset_print_log (id, customer_id, task_id, task_no, item_id, asset_id, print_time, print_result, error_message, source_type, printer_name, printer_ip, print_user_id, print_user_name, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{taskId}, #{taskNo}, #{itemId}, #{assetId}, #{printTime}, #{printResult}, #{errorMessage}, #{sourceType}, #{printerName}, #{printerIp}, #{printUserId}, #{printUserName}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update sb_asset_print_log set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now(), update_by = #{delBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and customer_id = #{tenantId}
